narrative:
Green 4-A (precinct in Summit County) has 895 registered voters, with 49.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.6%, a modest Republican lean of 4.9 percentage points.
